name: 04 · Loop Counter
description: Step 4 of the learning path. A Loop node iterates its body (a PhaseUpdate pass-through) until lp.iteration reaches the bound declared in loopCondition. Showcases the declared `<loop_id>.iteration` producer field (picker-visible, `.pyi`-typed), body_in/body_out wiring, and the rule that the stop condition belongs in loopCondition, not maxIterations or a post-loop Decision. Note: AutomatedStep bodies don't currently propagate the loop counter — that requires a deeper engine fix (parked-place iteration), tracked as follow-up.
